message:
✨ Widen NPS reach: show for demo/unauth visitors, lower thresholds (#8258)

The NPS widget was previously gated behind authenticated, non-demo users
with 5+ sessions and a 30-second idle delay. Since console.kubestellar.io
is ~99% demo-visitor traffic, almost nobody ever saw the prompt — only
2 responses shipped. Relax the gates so voluntary feedback actually has
an audience:

- Drop the `!isAuthenticated || isDemoMode()` guard. NPS is voluntary,
  user-initiated feedback with an explicit click-to-submit step, so
  gating it behind auth/demo state made no sense. Passive tracking
  opt-out still applies to every other analytics event.
- MIN_SESSIONS_BEFORE_NPS: 5 → 2 (prompt on the second visit).
- NPS_IDLE_DELAY_MS: 30_000 → 10_000.

All other timing guards (30-day reprompt cooldown, 7-day dismiss retry,
max-3-dismissals cap) are unchanged.

Tests updated: dropped the auth/demo-mode cases (no longer applicable),
added a demo-visitor positive case, and rebased session-threshold /
idle-delay assertions on the new constants.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
